back_translation: And a great sign appeared in heaven, namely a woman wearing the sun as a garment, with the moon under her feet, and on her head a crown of twelve stars
And she was pregnant, and cried out with a loud voice because of the pain of giving birth, and was tormented
And another sign appeared in heaven, namely behold, there was a great fire-red dragon, having seven heads and ten horns, and on its heads were seven crowns

And the tail of it dragged one-third of the stars from the sky, throwing them down on the earth. And that dragon stood before the woman who was about to give birth, in order that when she gave birth to her child, it would devour the infant
And she gave birth to a son, a male infant, the One who will rule all the nations with an iron rod. And her infant was caught up to God and to His throne
And that woman fled into the wilderness, where God had prepared for her, so that they would feed her there for one-thousand-two-hundred-sixty days
And there was war in heaven, Michael and his angels fought with the dragon, and the dragon and its angels also fought back
But it did not win, and there was no place for them in heaven any longer

And the great dragon was thrown down, namely the ancient serpent, the one called the devil and Satan, the deceiver of the whole world. It was thrown down on the earth, and its angels were thrown down with it

And I heard a loud voice in heaven saying, ‘Now, salvation, mighty-power, and the kingdom of our God, together with the authority of His Christ, have come. Because the accuser of our brothers, the one who accuses them day and night before the face of our God, has been thrown down
And they overcame it by the blood of the Lamb, and by their testimony, and they did not love their lives even unto death
Therefore, rejoice, heavens and those who dwell in them. But woe to the earth and the sea, because the devil has come down to you all, with very great anger, because it knows that it has little time’
And when the dragon saw that it had been thrown down on the earth, it pursued the woman who had given birth to that male child

And the woman received two great-eagle's wings, in order to fly into the wilderness, to her place, where she would be fed there for one time, times, and half a time, away from the face of that serpent
And the serpent spewed water out of its mouth, after the woman, like a river, in order to make the current sweep her away
But the earth helped that woman, and the earth opened its mouth, and swallowed up the river that the dragon had spewed out of its mouth
And the dragon was angry at that woman, and went to make war with the rest of her offspring, namely those who keep the commandments of God, and hold to the testimony of Jesus
And the dragon stood on the sand of the sea
